Components / Others

Highcharts

Interactive SVG-based charting library for line, bar, pie, area, and more. Use the Voyadores ERP theme for brand-aligned chart colors.

Setup

<script src="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/js/highcharts/highcharts.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/js/highcharts/highcharts-more.min.js"></script>
<!-- Optional: Voyadores brand theme -->
<script src="https://cdn.voyadores.com/content/js/highcharts/themes/erp-theme.min.js"></script>

Demo

Monthly Revenue (Bar)

Sales Trend (Line)

Expense Breakdown (Pie)

Performance (Area)

Usage

// Bar chart
Highcharts.chart('container', {
  chart: { type: 'bar' },
  title: { text: 'Revenue by Month' },
  xAxis: { categories: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'] },
  yAxis: { title: { text: 'Amount (₱)' } },
  series: [{ name: 'Revenue', data: [420000, 380000, 510000] }],
});

// Pie chart
Highcharts.chart('container', {
  chart: { type: 'pie' },
  title: { text: 'Expense Breakdown' },
  series: [{
    name: 'Amount',
    data: [
      { name: 'Salaries', y: 45 },
      { name: 'Operations', y: 30 },
      { name: 'Marketing', y: 25 },
    ],
  }],
});
On this page
